title: Fix shadow feed ticker — inning shown for pre-game recs
objective: The shadow feed ticker in the drawer (renderShadowFeed()) has the same pre-game inning bug that DASH_012 fixed on position cards. Line 898 appends inning text whenever r.inning is truthy, regardless of game_status. gameStatusChip() was already fixed in DASH_012 — reuse it here.

deliverables.label: Gate inning on LIVE status in renderShadowFeed()

acceptance_criteria: Shadow ticker rows for pre-game recs show only the matchup — no inning number
Shadow ticker rows for live in-game recs still show the inning (e.g. 'SEA@LAA i3')
verification: Any rec for a game not yet started: game column shows 'AWAY@HOME' with no inning suffix.
Any rec for a live game: game column shows 'AWAY@HOME i3' (or current inning).
